title_original: How Alice & Bob Uses NVIDIA CUDA-Q to Accelerate Quantum Error Correction Research - Alice & Bob
summary_original: Alice & Bob reports using NVIDIA’s CUDA-Q platform and graphics processing unit acceleration to significantly advance quantum error correction research for their cat-qubit quantum processing units, focusing on their customized Elevator Codes. In benchmarking, simulating 100,000 shots of their code’s decoding process on an NVIDIA Grace Hopper unit yielded a 9.25 times speed increase (1 hour 57 minutes) compared to a central processing unit-only approach (18 hours 2 minutes) using AMD Ryzen 9 9950X. This acceleration enables more rapid iteration and exploration of error correction codes, facilitating progress toward scalable, fault-tolerant quantum computing. The collaboration underscores the increasing integration of classical and quantum technologies in current quantum computing research.
